description: Representative WhatsApp-style catalog queries for RAG evaluation. Update expected_product_id values with real Supabase UUIDs once catalog is populated from invoice imports. Use expected_name for name-based matching when UUIDs are unknown.

queries.query: need greek yogurt for metro order
queries.notes: Fuzzy natural-language: product name with context words.
Romanian product name (iaurt grecesc = Greek yogurt). Tests multilingual fuzzy match.
Romanian: suc de portocale = orange juice. Tests non-English product phrase.

queries.query: re-comanda laptele de la saptamana trecuta
queries.notes: Romanian order repetition phrase: re-order the milk from last week. Tests fluffy intent phrasing.
Exact EAN-13 barcode lookup. Lexical mode should excel here; hybrid should also catch it.
Romanian barcode prefix (cod = code) + EAN. Tests prefix-bearing barcode query.
Romanian: mineral water 1.5L. Tests category + size abbreviation.
Romanian: digestive biscuits. Category-level fuzzy match.
Romanian: sunflower oil 1L. Tests oil category with Romanian name.
Romanian: white flour 1kg. Tests commodity product with unit.
Romanian: granulated sugar 1kg METRO. Tests brand context word alongside product.
Romanian cheese variant name. Tests partial product type match.
Romanian: dish detergent Fairy brand. Tests brand name alongside category.
Romanian: whole frozen chicken. Tests meat category with preparation state.
